theorem_statement: Chiral fermions cannot exist on a discrete lattice without doublers
solution: Domain Wall Fermions in the 5D holographic structure

key_elements.domain_wall: Higgs VEV profile v(z) creates the wall
key_elements.localization: Left-handed modes at z=0, doublers at z=L

generation_structure.topological: H₁(T³, Z) = Z³ has exactly 3 generators

chirality_mechanism.SU3_color: Bulk → couples to both L and R
chirality_mechanism.SU2_weak: Localized at z=0 → couples only to L

physical_interpretation: The 5D holographic structure naturally accommodates domain wall fermions, resolving the chirality crisis
